---
title : "Figure 10.3"
subtitle : "Boosting / Conditional Gradient for Lasso"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Random, Statistics, LinearAlgebra
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function run_boosting_lasso(X, y, Xtest, ytest, maxiter)
    n, d = size(X)
    beta = zeros(d)
    u = zeros(n)

    betas = zeros(d, maxiter)
    perftrain = zeros(maxiter)
    perftest = zeros(maxiter)

    for iter in 1:maxiter
        betas[:, iter] = beta
        perftrain[iter] = mean((y .- X * beta).^2)
        perftest[iter] = mean((ytest .- Xtest * beta).^2)

        grad = u .- y
        Xtg = X' * grad
        _, b = findmax(abs.(Xtg))

        betaloc = zeros(d)
        if dot(X[:, b], grad) > 0
            betaloc[b] = -1.0
        else
            betaloc[b] = 1.0
        end

        uloc = X * betaloc
        alpha = -dot(uloc, grad) / dot(uloc, uloc)

        u .+= uloc .* alpha
        beta .+= betaloc .* alpha
    end

    return perftrain, perftest, betas
end
```

```{julia}
rng = MersenneTwister(1)
d = 1000
n = 100
ntest = 1000
k = 5
sigma_noise = 0.5
maxiter = 50

X = randn(rng, n, d)
Xtest = randn(rng, ntest, d)

# 1. Sparse Case
beta_ast_sparse = zeros(d)
beta_ast_sparse[1:k] = sign.(randn(rng, k))

y_sp = X * beta_ast_sparse + sigma_noise * randn(rng, n)
ytest_sp = Xtest * beta_ast_sparse + sigma_noise * randn(rng, ntest)

train_sp, test_sp, betas_sp = run_boosting_lasso(X, y_sp, Xtest, ytest_sp, maxiter)

# 2. Non-Sparse Case
temp = randn(rng, d, d)
F = eigen(Symmetric(temp + temp'))
beta_ast_ns = F.vectors * beta_ast_sparse

y_ns = X * beta_ast_ns + sigma_noise * randn(rng, n)
ytest_ns = Xtest * beta_ast_ns + sigma_noise * randn(rng, ntest)

train_ns, test_ns, betas_ns = run_boosting_lasso(X, y_ns, Xtest, ytest_ns, maxiter)
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(1200, 1000), fontsize=18)
iters = 0:maxiter-1

# Sparse Errors
ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], title="Errors - sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="log(errors)", limits=((0, maxiter-1), (-5.0, 3.0)))
lines!(ax1, iters, log.(train_sp), color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax1, iters, log.(test_sp), color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax1, position=:rt)

# Sparse Weights
ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2], title="Weights - sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="weights", limits=((0, maxiter-1), (-1.2, 1.2)))
for i in 1:d
    is_active = i <= k
    if is_active
        lines!(ax2, iters, betas_sp[i, :], linewidth=2.0)
    else
        lines!(ax2, iters, betas_sp[i, :], color=(:black, 0.15), linewidth=1.0)
    end
end

# Non-Sparse Errors
ax3 = Axis(fig[2, 1], title="Errors - non sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="log(errors)", limits=((0, maxiter-1), (-5.0, 3.0)))
lines!(ax3, iters, log.(train_ns), color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax3, iters, log.(test_ns), color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax3, position=:rt)

# Non-Sparse Weights
ax4 = Axis(fig[2, 2], title="Weights - non sparse", xlabel="iterations", ylabel="weights", limits=((0, maxiter-1), (-1.2, 1.2)))
for i in 1:d
    lines!(ax4, iters, betas_ns[i, :], color=(:black, 0.15), linewidth=1.0)
end

fig
```
